string 2: Ow, that really hurt... Grr, I hate bees!
Ow... Ouch... Ow... Hey. Hear me out, would you?

These FunBeemon have a secret honey base near here. I'm sure
it's loaded with honey, but...

...when I tried to find it, they all flew out and attacked
me! Isn't that awful?!
{next}Sounds like a disaster.
{next}Are there really that many of them?
{next}Serves you right.

Listen. I know I'm the one who got greedy for their honey,
but, still...

I bet those angry FunBeemon have some Digimon afraid to go
out. There're that many of them.

Yeah, it's a huge swarm! They block out the sun. I'm not
even exaggerating!

There are so many FunBeemon, I bet they have some Digimon
afraid to go outside.
But honey is just so sweet and delicious...

Besides, with so many FunBeemon around, I bet they have some
Digimon afraid to go outside.
Hey, wait! What if the Titans are behind this?!

Yeah! It's gotta be some diabolical plot to immobilize us by
using FunBeemon!
{next}You could be on to something.
{next}Do you have any proof?
{next}I doubt that.
Right? And we can't let the Titans get away with it!

Well, uh... them making trouble for us is good for them,
right? How about that?

All right, but this is still a problem! We need to get those
FunBeemon out of here!
I'd be overjoyed if you could help me out!

The FunBeemon have built these things that LOOK like
beehives all around here.

But they could be new bases or communication points. Can you
take them out?
{next}Sure thing.
{end}I don't work for free.

Great! You're a lifesaver! Now, let me give you all the
details.

Oh... Then I'll have to come up with some reward.
Would that work for you?
A DigiAttack {r2} should be enough to take out those hive things.

Since they built those things, the FunBeemon have gone wild.
This'll help calm them down.

Be sure to report back when you're done. I'll be waiting for
you with a nice reward!

I want you to take out all those pesky FunBeemon hives.
Use your DigiAttack {r2} to reach 'em!

Welcome back! Looks like you took care of all those fake
beehives!

When the number of FunBeemon around suddenly dropped, I knew
it had to be thanks to you!

Now everyone in the forest can live in peace. Oh, and here.
Take this for your trouble!

Thanks! If there are any other Digimon in trouble, I hope
you can help them, too!

Thanks for taking out those fake beehives! The FunBeemon
really calmed down after that.

Looking back now, maybe I was wrong to search for their
base. You think they're still mad?
